steps.title: Identify the key action
steps.content: The soil is already sterilized (empty of microbes), and what follows the blank—”with slurries of live microbes”—indicates they're adding something to the soil.

steps.title: Match the action
steps.content:
Populated means to fill or stock with inhabitants or contents, which is exactly what the researchers did when introducing microbial slurries into the sterilized soil.

The other three either repeat what's already stated (sanitized, when soil is already sterilized), contradict the intended action (precluded means prevent), or describe an unrelated process (estimated).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
